student.notes: Scouts emerging artists and gives practical demo feedback; comfortable curating scenes and spotting early momentum. Particularly interested in early-stage indie projects and collaborative development environments.

Growth-minded marketer with a strong feel for UK rap culture and emerging scenes. Enjoys running social-first campaigns, testing formats, and using performance data to refine messaging and audience reach.

Detail-oriented and methodical, with a strong interest in publishing and sync. Enjoys matching music to briefs, keeping metadata clean, and building well-structured pitches for licensors and supervisors.
Calm and practical live-operations profile. Comfortable coordinating schedules, managing crews, and solving problems on show days. Enjoys the pace and teamwork of touring and production environments.

People-first artist management profile with strong communication instincts. Focused on planning, negotiation, and helping artists maintain sustainable routines while navigating releases and live work.
Interested in music-tech products and how audiences interact with platforms. Enjoys testing tools, running basic user research, and translating feedback into practical product improvements.
Grassroots promoter with a hands-on approach to local shows. Enjoys building welcoming nights from the ground up, combining simple design, clear promotion, and strong community relationships.
Steady and diplomatic touring assistant with experience supporting artists on the road. Comfortable handling logistics, artist relations, and long working days while keeping teams aligned and calm.
Streaming-focused with a data-driven mindset. Thinks in release cycles, playlist strategy, and measurable growth levers, using performance data to inform campaign decisions.
Interested in festival programming and curation. Enjoys researching line-ups, balancing creative vision with budgets, and coordinating with multiple stakeholders.
Community-minded organiser with an interest in youth-focused music projects. Motivated by access, inclusion, and creating supportive creative environments.
Curious about global music markets and cultural context. Enjoys research-led work and presenting insights that inform marketing and release strategies.
Business-affairs leaning with a preference for structure and clarity. Enjoys legal research, contract analysis, and preparing negotiation positions.
Visually minded with a strong interest in artist branding. Enjoys shaping coherent visual identities and building presentation assets that support releases and pitches.
Confident writer and interviewer with an interest in PR and editorial storytelling. Enjoys shaping narratives around new releases and emerging artists.
Finance-oriented with a focus on touring and live projects. Enjoys building forecasts, tracking costs, and supporting sustainable touring models.
Strong on international administration and cross-border logistics. Comfortable coordinating itineraries and communicating clearly across languages and teams.
Venue operations experience with strong front-of-house instincts. Calm under pressure and focused on creating positive audience and artist experiences.

Analytical and research-led, with a strong interest in business affairs and deal structures. Enjoys preparing background research, supporting negotiations, and translating complex information into clear summaries.
Entrepreneurial and outward-looking, interested in building independent projects and long-term business models around artists. Enjoys networking, pitching ideas, and thinking beyond single campaigns.
Strategic and people-focused, with a strong interest in artist management and long-term career development. Enjoys balancing creative ambition with practical planning and clear communication.
Marketing-focused with a strong interest in culturally led campaigns and audience insight. Enjoys shaping messaging that resonates with specific communities and scenes.
Drawn to live events and festival environments. Enjoys the coordination side of programming and supporting artists through well-run production processes.
Interested in international markets and cross-border releases. Enjoys research-led strategy and adapting campaigns for different cultural contexts.
Publishing-focused with a practical approach to rights, metadata, and administration. Enjoys keeping systems clean and supporting smooth licensing processes.
Audience-led digital marketer with a strong feel for online communities. Enjoys testing formats, tracking engagement, and refining campaigns based on platform performance.
Enjoys working at the intersection of music and community. Drawn to projects that support access, education, and long-term local impact.
Calm and organised with a strong interest in touring operations. Enjoys itinerary planning, artist care, and ensuring smooth day-to-day logistics on the road.
Brand-conscious and visually literate. Enjoys developing artist identities and translating creative direction into coherent visual outputs.
Interested in PR and media relations, with a focus on thoughtful storytelling and representation. Enjoys interviews, press writing, and building long-term journalist relationships.
Creator-led strategist with a strong interest in short-form platforms and audience behaviour. Enjoys building creator-first release strategies and testing content ideas quickly.
Careful and detail-focused, with a strong interest in rights administration and catalogues. Enjoys keeping records accurate and supporting long-term revenue flows.
Internationally minded with a focus on coordination and compliance. Interested in visas, administration, and supporting artists working across borders.
Venue-focused with experience in front-of-house and audience care. Values smooth operations and positive experiences for both artists and audiences.
Research-driven with an interest in global scenes and emerging markets. Enjoys presenting insights and supporting internationally focused strategies.
Focused on live promotion and grassroots touring. Enjoys building momentum for emerging artists through well-targeted local campaigns and strong venue relationships.
Quietly analytical with a strong interest in streaming data and audience insights. Enjoys dashboards, reporting, and using numbers to guide creative decisions.
Business-minded with an interest in entrepreneurship and long-term planning. Enjoys developing ideas into viable projects and pitching them clearly.
Focused on press and communications. Enjoys shaping narratives, preparing press materials, and supporting artists through release cycles.
Internationally oriented with a focus on coordination and market research. Enjoys supporting cross-border campaigns and analysing regional trends.
Drawn to community-facing live projects and inclusive programming. Enjoys working with grassroots venues and supporting emerging local talent.
Analytical and research-focused, with a strong interest in rights, contracts, and international market structures.
Interested in artist branding and visual storytelling. Enjoys translating creative direction into consistent visual assets across platforms.
Strong communicator with an interest in PR strategy and relationship-building. Enjoys shaping press narratives and managing media outreach.
Interested in global music scenes and cultural exchange. Enjoys research-led strategy and supporting internationally focused projects.
Process-driven with a strong interest in operations and coordination. Enjoys keeping projects on track and supporting teams through clear organisation.
Interested in international branding and cross-market strategy. Enjoys adapting campaigns for different cultural contexts and audience expectations.
Enjoys live event environments and festival settings. Interested in production support, scheduling, and ensuring smooth on-the-day delivery.
Data-inclined with a strong interest in audience insights and performance reporting. Enjoys translating numbers into clear recommendations.
Internationally experienced with an interest in coordination, compliance, and artist support across borders. Enjoys structured, detail-oriented work.
